tr.td: 0.3 mg (1 mg/mL) injected intramuscularly as needed for severe allergic reaction
Hydrocortisone 10 mg/g and urea 100 mg/g cutaneous cream
Apply a thin layer (hydrocortisone 10 mg/g and urea 100 mg/g) to the affected area 2 times daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product

ul.li: Patient will implement lifestyle changes to reduce risk of progression to diabetes, including dietary modifications, increased physical activity, and regular blood glucose monitoring.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
